title: Kaalangathale Lyrics Venghai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Karthik
Song: Kaalangathale 
Lyrics: Viveka
Music : Devi Sri Prasad
Movie :Venghai


Kaalangathale, maranjirukum vennila pola
Enna pathale, Olinjikiruye ..penne..hmm hmm .. hmm hmm.
Kaalangathale, maranjirukum vennila pola
Enna pathale, Olinjikiruye ..penne..
Pozhuthu sanjaale, thala kuniyum thaamarai pola
Enna pathale, vetakapaduriye..penne

Unnai nan parthen, nan rasithen, nan thindadinen,
Unnai nan thodardhen, nan unnardhen, nan kadhal kondaen,
En vazhkayin vasale neeye thaanadi ..oh oh.. oh.
Kaalangathale, maranjirukum vennila pola
Enna pathale, Olinjikiruye ..penne..
Pozhuthu sanjaale, thala kuniyum thaamarai pola
Enna pathale, vetakapaduriye..penne

Uthattai sulithu sirukum pozhudhu, 
Uyiril vedi vaikirai ...
Ovvoru varthai mudiyum pozhudhum
etharku podi vaikirai ..
Kollu bommai pol irukirai,
nee kodi mullai pol nadakiraai
Adikadi nagam kadikirai, ennai Mayaki mayam seithai
Nan rathiri pathidum vanavil neee.. ohhhhoooh..oh

Kaalangathale, maranjirukum vennila pola ...

Palasai maraka, nenaikum unnaku nadika varavillaye
Oouvam marandhu, puruvam viriya siruvan nanillaye
Etharku nee ennai thavirkiraai,
En ethirile mugam sivakirai,
Agamellam poi poosiye ennai arugil serka maruthaai
En aaviyai thaangidum en theeye neeyadi..ohhhhoooh..oh

Kaalangathale, maranjirukum vennila pola
Enna pathale, Olinjikiruye ..penne..
Pozhuthu sanjaale, thala kuniyum thaamarai pola
Enna pathale, vetakapaduriye..penne

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kaalangathale?

The song revolves around themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of a romantic relationship.

Who composed the music for Venghai?

The music for Venghai was composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

Who is the singer of Kaalangathale?

The song is sung by the talented Karthik.

What is the release year of Venghai?

The movie Venghai was released in 2011.

What role does Kaalangathale play in the movie?

The song enhances the romantic subplot, adding depth to the characters' emotional journey.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Venghai, Kaalangathale is a poignant melody that underscores the romantic tension between the lead characters. The song's soothing composition by Devi Sri Prasad and heartfelt lyrics by Viveka evoke a sense of longing and affection. Karthik's soulful rendition adds depth to the emotions portrayed on screen. This song beautifully captures the essence of love, making it a memorable part of the film's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kaalangathale from Venghai is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by the soulful Karthik and composed by the talented Devi Sri Prasad, this song beautifully blends soothing tunes with heartfelt lyrics by Viveka. Dive into this romantic journey and experience the magic of Tamil cinema's musical brilliance.
stanzaMeanings: In the morning, like the hidden moon, you hide when I look at you, dear. In the evening, like a shy lotus, you feel embarrassed when I see you, dear. I saw you, I enjoyed you, I followed you, I loved you. You are the door to my life, dear. In the morning, like the hidden moon, you hide when I look at you, dear. In the evening, like a shy lotus, you feel embarrassed when I see you, dear. When you smile with twisted lips, you set my heart on fire. Why do you sprinkle dust at the end of every word? You are like a doll, you walk like a creeper. You often bite your nails, you enchant me. You are the rainbow I see at night. In the morning, like the hidden moon... I can't act to forget my desires. I'm not a boy who forgets and smiles. Why do you avoid me? Your face turns red in front of me. You painted lies all over and didn't come close to me. You are the fire that holds my soul, dear. In the morning, like the hidden moon, you hide when I look at you, dear. In the evening, like a shy lotus, you feel embarrassed when I see you, dear.
